source_title: Second Law of Thermodynamics — Entropy
description: The Second Law builds on the framework introduced by the First Law.

source_title: Carnot Efficiency
description: Carnot efficiency is a direct consequence of the Second Law.

source_title: Carnot Efficiency
description: Energy balance (1st Law) is needed alongside entropy (2nd Law).

source_title: Hooke's Law — Linear Elasticity
description: Knowing the elastic stress-strain relation enables FoS calculations.

source_title: Hooke's Law — Linear Elasticity
description: Flexure formula assumes linear elastic material behaviour.

source_title: Beam Bending — Flexure Formula
description: Understanding bending stresses supports column stability analysis.

source_title: Kirchhoff's Voltage Law (KVL)
description: KVL circuit analysis uses Ohm's Law for resistive voltage drops.

source_title: Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL)
description: Nodal analysis combines KCL with Ohm's Law.

source_title: PID Controller — Transfer Function
description: Digital PID implementation must respect the Nyquist sampling criterion.

source_title: ADC Resolution and Measurement Precision
description: Correct ADC sampling requires the Nyquist criterion to be met.

source_title: NTC Thermistor Temperature Sensing
description: Thermistor voltage output must be digitised by the ADC.

source_title: RTD (PT100/PT1000) Temperature Measurement
description: RTD resistance is converted to voltage for ADC input.

source_title: Sensor Calibration and Traceability to SI
description: Calibration improves the accuracy of thermistor readings.

source_title: Sensor Calibration and Traceability to SI
description: Pressure sensor calibration is required for accurate QNH data.

source_title: Radiation Shield for Meteorological Temperature Sensors

source_title: IP (Ingress Protection) Rating — IEC 60529

source_title: SLAM — Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping

description: LiDAR point clouds are the primary sensor input for LiDAR SLAM.

source_title: Coverage Path Planning — Boustrophedon (Lawnmower) Algorithm
description: Coverage planning requires a consistent map from SLAM.

source_title: A* Pathfinding Algorithm

source_title: Differential Drive Robot Kinematics
description: Differential drive pose estimation depends on encoder odometry.

source_title: SLAM — Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping
description: SLAM motion model uses differential-drive kinematic equations.

source_title: DC Motor Speed Control via PWM

description: BLDC motor performance determines the achievable suction and airflow.

source_title: HEPA Filter Efficiency and Filtration Grade

description: HEPA filter pressure drop directly reduces system airflow.

source_title: Robot Runtime Estimation from Battery Capacity

source_title: Automatic Charging Dock — IR Beacon Homing

source_title: OTA Firmware Update for Embedded Devices

source_title: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit) for Robot Navigation
description: IMU angular rate supplements wheel odometry for improved pose estimation.

source_title: Kalman Filter for Sensor Fusion
target_title: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit) for Robot Navigation
description: Kalman filter combines IMU gyro and accel for stable attitude estimate.

source_title: Kalman Filter for Sensor Fusion
description: Kalman filter measurements must be sampled above the Nyquist rate.

source_title: N-Channel MOSFET as a Low-Side Power Switch
description: H-bridge circuits are built from four MOSFETs acting as switches.

source_title: CT Clamp Current Sensing and RMS Calculation
description: CT clamp output must be digitised by an ADC for RMS calculation.

target_title: DC Motor Speed Control via PWM
description: Joint actuators (servos or DC motors with encoders) execute IK-derived angle commands.

source_title: NDIR CO₂ Sensor — Non-Dispersive Infrared
description: Modern NDIR CO₂ modules (e.g. SCD41) communicate via I²C.

source_title: Capacitive Soil Moisture Sensing
description: Soil moisture sensor voltage output is read by MCU ADC.

description: ESP32 WiFi stack carries MQTT messages to the cloud broker.

source_title: ESP32 WiFi + BLE System-on-Chip

description: ESP32 integrated BLE is the hardware enabling BLE app connectivity.

description: RFID reader ICs (MFRC522) support I²C in addition to SPI.

source_title: PM2.5 Optical Particle Counter
description: PM2.5 and CO₂ sensors complement each other in complete air quality monitors.

source_title: Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) — Wheel Slip Control
target_title: Hydraulic Disc Brake — Four-Wheeler Emergency Stop
description: ABS modulates the hydraulic pressure of disc brakes to prevent wheel lock-up.

description: Hydraulic disc brakes operate at zero speed; eddy-current brakes cannot.

source_title: Snake Robot — Serpentine Locomotion Kinematics
description: Snake locomotion uses multi-link undulation vs differential-drive wheel-based movement.

description: Android BT app sends gait parameters (A, T, φ) to drive snake robot locomotion.

source_title: Slider-Crank to Reciprocating Hacksaw Drive

description: Both convert rotary motor output to controlled linear/oscillating motion.

source_title: Cam and Follower Mechanism — Displacement Profiles
target_title: Scissor Lift / Pantograph — Mechanical Advantage and Geometry
description: Both are mechanisms providing force/motion transformation in mechanical systems.

source_title: Ackermann Four-Wheel Steering Geometry
description: Both describe vehicle turning geometry and wheel angle relationships.

description: TOF LIDAR is one implementation method for 3D scanning point cloud acquisition.

source_title: 3D Scanning — Structured Light and Laser Triangulation

description: Laser triangulation scanners rely on the same time-of-flight or phase-shift ranging principles.

source_title: 360-Degree Fire Detection and Suppression System

description: Both are environmental detection systems triggering automated actuator responses.

description: Both involve timed mechanical cycles — fry cycle timing vs cam rotation period.

source_title: Wire Cutting and Insulation Stripping — Blade Mechanics
target_title: Sugarcane Processing — Node Cutting and Bud Viability
description: Both involve controlled blade cutting to precise depths without damaging the core material.

source_title: Screen Printing — Squeegee Pressure and Ink Rheology
description: Both use linear reciprocating motion (squeegee stroke / hacksaw stroke) driven by a motor.

source_title: Underwater Thruster — Hydrodynamic Thrust and Propulsion
target_title: Air Hockey Table — Puck Lift by Air Cushion and Rebound Dynamics
description: Both apply fluid dynamics — propeller thrust vs air-film levitation.

source_title: Folding Table Hinge — Self-Locking and Motorised Actuation
target_title: Scissor Lift / Pantograph — Mechanical Advantage and Geometry
description: Both involve motorised mechanical linkages with self-locking under load requirements.

source_title: Mattress Cleaning — Vibration Beater and HEPA Suction

description: Vibration beater mechanism uses eccentric cam to generate 30–50 Hz oscillation.

source_title: Cold-Gas Thruster Dynamics and Pulse-Width Modulation Control
description: Cold-gas thruster ΔV budget is computed using the Tsiolkovsky equation with Isp of the propellant.

source_title: Cold-Gas Thruster Dynamics and Pulse-Width Modulation Control
description: Cold-gas micro-thrusters are a primary propulsion option for 1U–3U CubeSat attitude and orbit control.

source_title: Fault Detection and Isolation in Embedded Propulsion Controllers
description: FDI pressure thresholds are set using Factor of Safety margins to avoid operating near structural limits.

source_title: Fault Detection and Isolation in Embedded Propulsion Controllers
target_title: Cold-Gas Thruster Dynamics and Pulse-Width Modulation Control
description: FDI wraps the cold-gas thruster controller to detect valve failures and enforce safe-hold transitions.

source_title: Three-Axis RCS Thruster Allocation and Torque Mapping
target_title: Cold-Gas Thruster Dynamics and Pulse-Width Modulation Control
description: Thruster allocation relies on PWM pulse-width modulation dynamics to convert torque commands into solenoid open-times.

source_title: Three-Axis RCS Thruster Allocation and Torque Mapping
description: The thruster allocation scheme is sized for a 1U–3U CubeSat moment-of-inertia envelope, enabling attitude hold maneuvers within the platform's propellant budget.

source_title: Three-Axis RCS Thruster Allocation and Torque Mapping
description: Solenoid duty-cycle caps and propellant reserve margins are set using FoS≥1.5 to prevent valve failure and propellant depletion.

source_title: Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) for Photovoltaic Sources
description: MPPT is a charge-control operating mode of the EPS; it requires the charge regulator, shunt monitors, and battery bus to be present.

source_title: CubeSat Electrical Power System (EPS) Architecture
description: The EPS is a mandatory subsystem that powers all other CubeSat subsystems defined by the 1U–3U form-factor standard.

source_title: Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) for Photovoltaic Sources
description: MPPT maximises energy harvest from body-mounted panels, extending CubeSat operational lifetime per orbit.

source_title: Rainwater First-Flush Diversion
target_title: Solenoid Valve for Pneumatic and Fluid Control
description: Automated first-flush diversion relies on a solenoid valve to switch flow routing between waste drain and storage tank based on sensor feedback.

source_title: Rainwater First-Flush Diversion
target_title: Water Quality Multi-Parameter Sensing (pH, TDS, DO)
description: Diverting the first flush pre-conditions harvested water to a quality range that multi-parameter sensors can accurately characterise and act upon.

source_title: Heat of Reaction and Calorimetry
description: Calorimetry applies the first law: heat released or absorbed equals the change in enthalpy (constant pressure) or internal energy (constant volume), both state functions conserved by the first law.

source_title: Chemical Equilibrium and Le Chatelier's Principle
description: Equilibrium temperature dependence is driven by the reaction enthalpy quantified by calorimetry.

source_title: Reaction Rate Kinetics — Arrhenius Equation
description: Activation energy and thermal rate expressions are grounded in energy conservation.

source_title: Reaction Rate Kinetics — Arrhenius Equation
target_title: Chemical Equilibrium and Le Chatelier's Principle
description: Arrhenius equation quantifies the rate at which equilibrium is re-established after a temperature perturbation.

source_title: Vapor Pressure and Clausius-Clapeyron Equation
description: ΔHvap extracted from Clausius-Clapeyron plot is a calorimetric enthalpy quantity.

source_title: Vapor Pressure and Clausius-Clapeyron Equation
description: Derivation assumes vapour behaves as an ideal gas at low pressures.

source_title: pH and Buffer Chemistry
target_title: Chemical Equilibrium and Le Chatelier's Principle
description: Buffer equilibria and pH setpoint shifts with temperature are a direct application of Le Chatelier's principle.

source_title: pH and Buffer Chemistry
description: pH monitoring complements calorimetric measurements in aqueous acid-base reactions.

source_title: Adiabatic Processes and Heat Capacity Measurement
description: Adiabatic calorimetry is a direct application of the first law with Q=0 for the surroundings.

source_title: Adiabatic Processes and Heat Capacity Measurement
description: Accurate Cp measurement is a prerequisite for quantitative calorimetric heat-of-reaction determination.

source_title: Crystal Nucleation and Growth Kinetics
description: Nucleation free-energy barrier ΔG* is a thermodynamic quantity governed by entropy and enthalpy of the solid-liquid interface.

source_title: Crystal Nucleation and Growth Kinetics
description: Latent heat released during crystallisation is measurable by calorimetry and appears as a deviation in the cooling curve.

source_title: Gibbs Free Energy and Chemical Spontaneity
description: Gibbs energy combines enthalpy and entropy (G = H − TS), so it is fundamentally derived from the second law.

source_title: Gibbs Free Energy and Chemical Spontaneity
description: Gibbs energy of ideal gas mixtures is expressed in terms of PV = nRT variables, linking gas law to thermodynamic spontaneity.

source_title: Heat Exchanger Effectiveness — NTU Method
description: NTU method is an energy balance derived from the first law applied to both fluid streams.

source_title: Heat Exchanger Effectiveness — NTU Method
description: Entropy generation in the heat exchanger is inversely related to its effectiveness — a higher NTU yields lower irreversibility.

source_title: Seebeck Effect and Thermoelectric Power Generation
description: Thermoelectric conversion is bounded by Carnot efficiency; the Seebeck effect is a thermodynamic irreversible process.

source_title: Seebeck Effect and Thermoelectric Power Generation
description: Seebeck voltage output can be calibrated as a continuous calorimetric proxy for sustained chemical heat flux.

source_title: Combustion Enthalpy and Standard Heat of Formation
description: Combustion enthalpy is measured directly by calorimetry; bomb calorimeter is the standard instrument.

source_title: Combustion Enthalpy and Standard Heat of Formation
description: Hess's law and heat of formation calculations are direct consequences of energy conservation.

source_title: Distillation Column Mass and Energy Balance
description: Reboiler duty calculation relies on latent heat measured calorimetrically for the feed mixture.

source_title: Distillation Column Mass and Energy Balance
description: Vapour-liquid equilibrium in the distillation column is governed by the temperature-dependent vapour pressures of each component.

source_title: Structural Resonance and Dynamic Amplification Factor
description: DAF directly scales the dynamic bending stress computed by the flexure formula sigma = M*c/I

source_title: Structural Resonance and Dynamic Amplification Factor
description: DAF must be incorporated into FoS calculations under dynamic or cyclic loading conditions

source_title: Rankine Earth Pressure Theory
description: Lateral earth pressure is treated as a distributed load on the retaining wall stem, analysed with the flexure formula to size reinforcement.

source_title: Euler Critical Buckling Load with Effective Length Factor
description: Extends the basic Euler formula with effective length factor K to cover real end-restraint conditions found in construction practice.

source_title: Concrete Hydration Exotherm and Thermal Gradient Limits
description: Thermal gradients through the concrete section create restrained thermal stresses analogous to bending, analysed using transformed-section flexure principles.

source_title: Manning's Equation for Open Channel Flow Capacity
description: Manning's equation quantifies downstream channel capacity to confirm that first-flush diverted volume can be safely conveyed without overtopping.

source_title: Tuned Mass Damper Optimal Frequency and Damping Ratios
target_title: Structural Resonance and Dynamic Amplification Factor
description: TMD sizing requires the primary structure's natural frequency and dynamic amplification factor to correctly set the secondary mass frequency and damping ratio.

source_title: Factor of Safety for Infinite Slope Stability
description: Retaining structures at slope toes are designed using flexure formula once the driving earth force is known from slope stability analysis.

source_title: ACI 318 Flexural Crack Width Limits and Gergely-Lutz Approximation
description: Crack width is a direct function of tensile steel stress, which is computed from the flexure formula applied to the cracked beam section.

source_title: Joukowsky Water Hammer Pressure Surge in Pipe Flow
description: First-flush diversion valves must use slow-close actuation to prevent water hammer in the collection pipe network.

source_title: Linear Thermal Expansion of Structural Metals in Civil Applications
description: Restrained thermal expansion generates secondary moments in continuous beams that are superimposed on live-load moments and analysed with the flexure formula.

source_title: Allowable Angular Distortion and Differential Settlement Limits
description: Angular distortion induces secondary bending moments in frame beams above differentially settling footings, analysed with the flexure formula for cracking risk assessment.

source_title: Maturity Method for Concrete Compressive Strength Estimation
target_title: Concrete Hydration Exotherm and Thermal Gradient Limits
description: Maturity index computation depends on accurate temperature history captured from sensors monitoring the hydration exotherm.

source_title: Dielectric Cure Monitoring Ion Viscosity and Degree of Cure
description: Real-time degree-of-cure data informs selection of cure schedule to achieve target mechanical properties on the Ashby charts.

source_title: Electroplating Current Density and Hull Cell Deposit Quality
description: Surface deposit quality and hardness targets are selected from Ashby property charts prior to specifying current density operating window.

source_title: Powder Metallurgy Sintering Kinetics and Densification Modelling
description: Sintering temperature and atmosphere selection depends on the target material's diffusivity and final property requirements on Ashby charts.

source_title: Nitinol Shape Memory Alloy Transformation Temperature and Actuation Hysteresis
description: SMA alloy composition (Ni:Ti ratio) is chosen using Ashby charts to target required transformation temperatures and recovery stress.

source_title: Carbon Fibre Prepreg Out-of-Autoclave Cure Cycle Optimisation
description: Fibre and resin system selection using Ashby charts precedes definition of cure cycle temperature and pressure parameters.

source_title: Linear Polarisation Resistance Corrosion Rate Measurement for Steel
target_title: Concrete Hydration Exotherm and Thermal Gradient Limits
description: Corrosion monitoring is deployed in reinforced concrete; hydration chemistry and moisture content directly affect rebar electrochemical activity.

source_title: Thermal Spray WC-Co Coating Porosity and Adhesion Strength Correlation
description: WC-Co coating specification (hardness, toughness, porosity limit) is selected from Ashby wear-resistance and hardness charts for target application.

source_title: Miner's Rule Cumulative Fatigue Damage and S-N Curve Life Estimation
description: S-N curve Basquin constants (C, m) are material-specific and selected from endurance data on Ashby fatigue charts.

source_title: Miner's Rule Cumulative Fatigue Damage and S-N Curve Life Estimation
target_title: Fault Detection and Isolation in Embedded Propulsion Controllers
description: Fatigue damage accumulation provides a materials-based precursor signal for fault detection before structural failure.

source_title: Ceramic Sintering Grain Growth Kinetics and Final Density Evolution
description: Target ceramic density and hardness are specified from Ashby charts, which then constrain sintering temperature and dwell duration.

source_title: Ceramic Sintering Grain Growth Kinetics and Final Density Evolution
target_title: Powder Metallurgy Sintering Kinetics and Densification Modelling
description: Ceramic sintering shares diffusion-driven densification physics with powder metallurgy models; ceramic activation energies are higher.

source_title: Polymer Melt Flow Index and Viscosity Temperature Dependence
description: MFI and viscosity data populate polymer processing charts; Ashby selection of polymer type precedes MFI specification.

source_title: Adaptive Gain Scheduling for PID Controllers
description: Gain-region lookup executes in O(1); critical for real-time loop budget compliance.

source_title: Adaptive Gain Scheduling for PID Controllers
target_title: Stepper Motor Closed-Loop Control via Magnetic Encoder Feedback
description: Adaptive gains improve closed-loop tracking under varying motor load, as validated in magnetic-encoder stepper control literature.

source_title: Differential Drive Kinematics and Turning Radius
description: A* supplies next-cell direction; kinematics converts it to left/right motor commands.

source_title: Cooperative Task Scheduling on Bare-Metal MCU
description: O(N) scan overhead must remain less than the shortest task period to prevent deadline misses.

source_title: Cooperative Task Scheduling on Bare-Metal MCU
description: Amdahl bounds the concurrency benefit achievable by cooperative scheduling on a single core.

source_title: Complementary Filter for IMU Attitude Estimation
description: O(1) per-axis filter meets 1 kHz loop budget on Cortex-M MCUs without matrix overhead.

source_title: Shape Memory Alloy Nitinol Thermal Actuation Characteristics
target_title: Stepper Motor Closed-Loop Control via Magnetic Encoder Feedback
description: SMA wire offers silent short-stroke actuation as a complement to stepper-based positioning in space-constrained designs.

source_title: Finite State Machine Fault Recovery Patterns
description: State dispatch is O(1) per event; FSM scales to complex systems without timing penalty on MCU.

source_title: Fixed-Point FFT for Embedded Vibration Analysis
description: FFT is O(N log N); Big-O analysis bounds maximum N achievable within a 2 ms real-time window on AVR.

source_title: Fixed-Point FFT for Embedded Vibration Analysis
description: FFT butterfly stages are partially parallelisable; Amdahl bounds speedup on dual-core hardware.

source_title: Wheel Odometry Dead-Reckoning and Kalman Heading Fusion
description: Accurate dead-reckoning provides current grid cell position for A* replanning after each move.

source_title: Wheel Odometry Dead-Reckoning and Kalman Heading Fusion
target_title: Stepper Motor Closed-Loop Control via Magnetic Encoder Feedback
description: Quadrature encoder feedback principle from closed-loop stepper control applies directly to differential drive odometry.

source_title: Multi-Zone Thermal Decoupling in Array Heater Systems
description: Interaction matrix evaluation is O(N²) per cycle; bounded by N≤8 for real-time feasibility on Arduino Mega.

source_title: Run-Length Encoding Efficiency for Embedded Sensor Logs
description: RLE encoder runs in O(N) — verified against Big-O loop-budget constraints for 100 Hz real-time logging.

source_title: Run-Length Encoding Efficiency for Embedded Sensor Logs
description: RLE reduces the flash-write serial bottleneck, shifting the Amdahl serial fraction toward sensor sampling.
